name: Crystal Treasures: Match 3
description: Crystal Treasures: Match 3 is a colorful jewel puzzle game where players swap gems, create matches, complete level goals, and unlock bonus challenges. Match 3 or more gems, use boosters like Hammer, Bomb, and Lightning, collect coins, earn stars, and progress through 30 main levels. The game also includes special bonus modes such as Time Rush, Rare Crystal, and Super Challenge.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to swap gems and use buttons
